title: perilla frutescens f. viridis
intro: Perilla frutescens f. viridis, also known as korean chiliweed or perilla leaf, is a variety of the perilla frutescens plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of perilla leaf include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing relief from allergies and digestive issues. Perilla leaf is commonly prepared as a tea, supplement, or added to food, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and as a natural food coloring.
